---
name: Feature request (Application)
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the application (UI, engine, data, workflow)
title: '[Feature - Application] '
labels: enhancement, application
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or references (e.g., SECNAV/MCO requirements) that support the request.
